debug_info.goal:
pbar : Pose
ε : ℝ
poly : GoodPoly
pc : GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition poly pbar ε
P : Euc(3)
⊢ ‖P‖ * nth_partial 0 (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer pbar ε poly P pc) pbar.outerParams =
    inner ℝ (pbar.rotM₂θ P) (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.w poly pbar ε pc)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
have h := pc.fu_pose_eq_outer (p := pbar) P
  have hP : ‖P‖ ≠ 0 := by
    have : (0 : ℝ) < ‖P‖ := by
      simpa using (poly.nontriv P (by
        have : P ∈ poly.vertices := by
          simpa using pc.S_in_poly
        exact this))
    exact ne_of_gt this
  have hdiff : DifferentiableAt ℝ (pc.fu_outer P) pbar.outerParams := by
    have : ContDiff ℝ 2 (pc.fu_outer P) := by
      have : ‖pc.w‖ = 1 := pc.w_unit
      have : ‖P‖ > 0 := by
        have : (0 : ℝ) < ‖P‖ := by
          simpa using (poly.nontriv P (by
            have : P ∈ poly.vertices := by
              simpa using pc.S_in_poly
            exact this))
        exact this
      exact rotation_partials_exist_outer (S := P) (w := pc.w) this
    exact (this.differentiableAt (by norm_num : (0:ℕ) ≤ 2))
  have hdiff2 : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun q : ℝ³ => ⟪pc.w, (pbar.outer (fun i => q i))⟫) pbar.outerParams := by
    fun_prop
  have hder :
      (fderiv ℝ (pc.fu_outer P) pbar.outerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1) * ‖P‖ =
        (fderiv ℝ (fun q : ℝ³ => ⟪pc.w, (pbar.outer (fun i => q i))⟫) pbar.outerParams)
          (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1) := by
    have h1 := congrArg (fun g => (fderiv ℝ g pbar.outerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1)) h
    simp [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer] at h1
    simpa [mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc, smul_eq_mul, inv_mul_eq_div] using h1
  have : nth_partial 0 (pc.fu_outer P) pbar.outerParams =
      (fderiv ℝ (pc.fu_outer P) pbar.outerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1) := by
    simp [nth_partial]
  simp [this]
  have houter :
      (fderiv ℝ (fun q : ℝ³ => ⟪pc.w, (pbar.outer (fun i => q i))⟫) pbar.outerParams)
        (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1) = ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ := by
    sorry
  have : (fderiv ℝ (pc.fu_outer P) pbar.outerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1) * ‖P‖ =
      ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ := by
    simpa [houter] using hder
  simpa [mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc] using this
